location_targeting: Toronto, Etobicoke, Scarborough, North York, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Ajax, Pickering, GTA, Ontario, Canada

typography.pairing_descriptor: bold geometric condensed headings (Rajdhani 700) paired with clean readable body copy (Inter 400/500) — authoritative and professional without being corporate

imagery.style: real-work photography — technicians on the job, actual glass repair in progress
subjects: tech arriving at a residential home
GTA urban and suburban property exteriors
imagery.composition: action-oriented shots, high contrast, dark overlays on hero images, shield/blue brand color accents

aesthetic.texture: clean with metallic/chrome accents mirroring the logo — minimal flat layouts with bold typographic hierarchy
aesthetic.negative_space: moderate — content-dense for landing pages but well structured with clear visual hierarchy

brand_values: speed — we respond when it matters most
accountability — we stand behind every repair

target_audience.profession: homeowners, small business/storefront owners, property managers, condo building supers
pain_points: broken or shattered window needing immediate repair
foggy or seal-failed double-pane glass letting in cold air
sliding or patio door glass that needs replacing
not knowing who to call or what it will cost
fear of letting unknown technicians into their home or business
aspirations: property secured as fast as possible
trusted professional who shows up and solves the problem
no surprises — clear process, no hidden fees after approval
work done right the first time

tagline_alternatives: Protect Your Property. Call Solid Guard.
When Glass Breaks, We Guard What Matters.
positioning.brand_promise: We show up fast, assess for free, and fix it right — with background-checked technicians you can trust inside your home or business.
positioning.positioning_statement: Solid Guard is Toronto and the GTA's glass repair specialist. Unlike generalist window-and-door companies, we do one thing — glass repair and replacement — and we do it better than anyone. We respond to emergencies the same day, send background-checked technicians, and never start work without your approval. From a broken basement window to a smashed commercial storefront, Solid Guard secures your property fast.
differentiators: Glass specialists — not a windows-and-doors company that also does glass
24/7 emergency response — same-day availability including weekends
Background-checked technicians — safe to let into your home or business
Free on-site assessment — no commitment until you approve the quote
Residential and commercial — one call covers it all

hero_headline_options: Broken Glass? We're On Our Way.
landing_page.hero_subheadline: Broken window? Smashed storefront? We respond fast.
how_it_works_steps: Call or Request Online — we answer 24/7
We Come to You — free on-site assessment, same day
You Approve, We Fix — work starts only when you say go

services: Window glass replacement (single, double, triple pane)
